title: Reproducibility package for model-family sensitivity of Abaqus shell idealisations for H-section steel members

creators.name: REN, Lijian
creators.affiliation: Inner Mongolia University of Technology; Hohai University

description: Non-sensitive derived tables, public figures, claim-boundary matrices, solver-status summaries and scripts supporting a reproducible archive-based assessment of Abaqus shell model-family sensitivity for H-section steel members.
